domain_concepts.ComplianceHub: The centralized system for managing legal compliance and data privacy in Russia.
domain_concepts.ConsentLog: A database record mapping user consent for personal data and advertising.
domain_concepts.DataLocalization: Ensuring personal data is processed and stored on servers within the Russian Federation.
domain_concepts.SecurityHardening: A set of protocols and configurations applied to the server, admin panel, and APIs to mitigate threats.
domain_concepts.RKN_Notification: Notification to Roskomnadzor regarding the processing of personal data.

key_flows: User submits form -> System captures consent -> Consent is logged in DB -> Form data is sent to localized CRM.
User visits site -> Cookie banner appears -> User accepts/customizes -> Analytics loaded conditionally based on consent.
System backup -> Nightly snapshot taken -> Weekly restoration tested.
